_comment: Per-suite minimum pass-rate gate. The CI workflow fails the job if the actual pass-rate drops below the value here. Setting 1.0 means 'all tests must pass'; lower values let known failures surface in the Job Summary without blocking CI. Bump back to 1.0 once the underlying issue is fixed.

known_failures.synthesis: Prompt mandates `preliminary_conclusion: null`; model emits a string anyway. Real prompt-following violation — fix prompt, then bump threshold.
known_failures.audit: Audit prompt references CaseStatus enum without enumerating values; model invents `status: "open"` outside the enum. Fix prompt or add structured-output binding, then bump threshold.
